Chapter 21 Electrochemistry Section 21.1. Electrochemistry represents the interconversion of chemical energy and electrical energy. Electrochemistry involvesredox(reduction-oxidation) reactions because the electrical energy
(flow of electrons) has at its origin the oxidation (loss of electrons) and reduction (gain of electrons) of species.
